name: Sunrise Energy Metals Limited
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$13.8770. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$13.9393 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$13.8770, stop A$11.8305, target A$14.3800. Risk/reward is 0.25:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
